name: com.free2aitools/free2aitools
title: Free2AItools
description: Structured AI-entity discovery, evidence, and identity layer for agents.

com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.namespace_note: The 'com.free2aitools' namespace prefix is NOT yet verified/controlled in the official MCP Registry. Namespace ownership (DNS-based or GitHub-based) MUST be proven before any publication. Do not treat this candidate as evidence of a controlled namespace.
com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.version_coupling_note: version=2.0.1 references the MCP SERVER version domain only. It is coupled to Lane B's MCP server version: if Lane B does NOT bump the served server version to 2.0.1, this candidate MUST be reconciled back to the actually-served version (2.0.0). This is a coordination point with Lane B, not an independent assertion.
com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.license_note: Project is MIT (root LICENSE + packages/sdk/LICENSE). The 2025-12-11 server.schema.json has no top-level license field; license is conveyed via the repository (LICENSE in repo root) and is intentionally not fabricated into an unsupported field.
com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.schema_validation: Field shape validated against the cited 2025-12-11 server.schema.json (required: name, description, version; remotes[].type in {streamable-http, sse}; repository requires url+source). Official registry CLI / publish dry-run NOT run in this environment.
com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.served_manifest_distinction: This file is DISTINCT from public/.well-known/mcp.json. That .well-known file is the served, site-local MCP manifest (tool catalog); this file is an official-Registry submission CANDIDATE and is intentionally placed at a non-served docs path so it is never mistaken for a published or served artifact.
com.free2aitools/lane-c-candidate.publication_status: NO Registry publication has occurred. This is a review-only candidate awaiting Founder authorization and namespace-ownership verification.
